creator: kaiwang27@gmail.com
text:
Hello Emanuel,

I believe this mouse is supported now, a patch which was committed by
jhb@ should solve the UISUBCLASS problem several Razer mice have.

It was solved in a different way, see this PR for details:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=usb/118670

If you have the mouse, could you please confirm that it is supported
now so we can close the PR?

Thanks,
Kai
